summary: Full backend + frontend e2e validation of the Pharma Rentabilidade app. All backend endpoints (cardex upload/get, analysis upload/latest/list/get/delete, validation of file types, 400 when cardex missing) pass via pytest (10/10). Frontend e2e (Settings XLS upload, Dashboard TXT upload, KPIs, chart, lab summary table, product search/sort/filter, green/red diff colors) all work correctly with real production files.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses asyncio.get_event_loop() / on_event('shutdown') which are deprecated in modern FastAPI/Python 3.11 - consider lifespan handlers (not breaking).
Cardex products are stored as a dict in MongoDB with CNP as keys; OK for ~5k products but could become slow for large files - consider an indexed collection if scale grows.
analyse_txt loads the entire result into the response (products+labs+summary, ~980 rows here); for larger TXT files this could grow large. Currently fine.
No data-testid on top-level nav links other than nav-dashboard/nav-settings (good) but no data-testid on the toast container - acceptable as toasts use sonner role='status'.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Cardex (cardex.xlsx, 5093 products / 17 labs) and a sales analysis (980 products / 17 labs) were uploaded to MongoDB through the API during tests. The cardex is restored after the requires-cardex test, so the DB stays in a usable state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_rentabilidade.py - runs in ~5s and self-restores cardex. Public files cached under /tmp/test_files/{cardex.xlsx,vendas.txt}. Frontend route for Definições is /definicoes. All key elements expose data-testid (nav-dashboard, nav-settings, xls-dropzone, txt-dropzone, cardex-status, kpi-rent-real/cardex/diff/products/labs, product-search, product-lab-filter, sort-<key>, lab-row-<lab>). Expected KPI numbers (with provided files): Real 69 766,83 €, Cardex 74 344,20 €, Diff -4 577,43 €, 980 produtos, 17 laboratórios.
